chapters.name: First Contact
chapters.theme: Initial exploration — testing competitor approaches against a large, unfamiliar React codebase.

chapters.name: Pattern Recognition
chapters.theme: Deeper architectural queries — do competitors adapt strategy as familiarity grows?
chapters.thesis: Breadth queries converge — 4 consecutive ties. Depth query R28 produced widest spread (2pts). Paradigm difference is in reasoning depth, not coverage.

chapters.name: Depth Probes
chapters.theme: Testing whether depth and constrained queries break the convergence pattern.

chapters.name: ORM Foundations
chapters.theme: Testing search paradigms against a mature Python codebase with deep ORM internals.

chapters.name: Core Architecture
chapters.theme: How do search paradigms handle a small, well-structured async Python codebase?
